packageInfoDetail.updateDesc:
【自在 AI 每一刻】
新增自由写支持更多细分场景：写邀请函、申请书等，让工作游刃有余；还可以一键生成多条祝福语、问候语等，让生活从容自在
新增 AI 播客功能，将新闻、长文章等通过大模型生成播客，方便在通勤等场景轻松听播客，丰富信息获取方式
新增支持通过智能侧边栏快速调出清理存储小工具，清理更方便快捷
优化朗读英文文章时的英文音色，可切换选择 2 种音色，朗读声音更自然
优化摘要和字幕的结束逻辑，在持续一定时间没声音输入时，自动结束摘要和字幕

【处处有细节，细节有惊喜】
新增在相册中裁剪旋转照片时，支持自动校正，可以实现自动水平校正、人像校正和建筑校正，轻松解决构图中的歪斜和畸变问题
新增视频编辑支持剪辑、分割、多段拼接、音乐、文字、变速、调节、自由裁切等，轻松成片、原画直出
新增相册筛选面板支持选择“实况”、“截屏录屏”和“已编辑”三个选项，筛选图片和视频更便捷
新增日历的“显示国际节日”开关，开启可显示国际节日，关闭仅显示中国法定节日和传统节日
优化相册的缩略图解析方式，提升系统相册的缩略图显示速度
优化平板区域截屏流程，截屏操作更跟手

【安全隐私】
新增支持在私密保险箱中编辑图片和视频，无需将其解除私密即可进行编辑，使用更安心
packageInfoDetail.updateDescEnglish:
【Effortless AI at every moment】
The "Write anything" feature now supports more specific scenarios, such as invitation letters and applications, improving work efficiency. It can also quickly generate multiple blessings and greetings, making life easier.
Adds the AI Podcast feature, which converts news articles and long texts into podcasts, making it easier to acquire information while commuting and in other scenarios.
You can now launch storage cleanup tools directly from Smart Sidebar for easier storage cleanup.
You can now switch between two options for the English voice when having English articles read aloud, making it more natural.
Improves the logic for ending summaries and subtitles by automatically ending them when there has been no sound input for a certain period.

【Delight in details】
You can now use automatic straightening when cropping and rotating portrait and architectural photos in the Photos app.
The video editing function now supports cutting, splitting, multi-clip stitching, music, text, speed adjustment, cropping, and more, making creation easier.
The filter in the Photos app now supports "Motion Photo", "Screenshots & screen recordings", and "Edited" options, making it easier to filter images and videos.
Adds a "Show international holidays" switch in the Calendar settings. Turning it on shows international holidays, while turning it off only displays public holidays and festivals in China.
Improves the thumbnail parsing method in the Photos app to speed up the display of thumbnails in the app.
Improves the partial screenshot process on tablets for easier operations.

【Security & privacy】
You can now edit images and videos directly in Private Safe, without needing to unlock them.
